hero.title: Complete Turnkey Biopharma Lines — Built for Quality and Compliance, Engineered for Output
hero.desc: ARGOTEX delivers total biopharma manufacturing solutions — integrating cleanroom environments, process vessels, isolator systems, and SCADA controls, all validated end-to-end (IQ/OQ/PQ) under PIC/S GMP to guarantee consistent quality and measurable production results.
hero.credit: Founded by biopharmaceutical engineering specialists with over 50 years of cumulative international GMP experience.

trust.exp_label: Cumulative Years of Biopharma Expertise — Led by senior validation & design engineers

lifecycle.title: The Biopharma Plant Delivery Journey
lifecycle.desc: From the initial CAD conceptual flow designs to international regulatory audit validations, we manage and assume complete ownership of your production lifecycle.

steps.title: Conceptual Design & P&ID
steps.subtitle: Conceptual Design & P&ID
steps.desc: We draft compliance layout flows for HVAC systems, materials, and operators using advanced 3D simulations. Developing initial P&ID diagrams ensuring early validation mapping.

steps.title: Modular Cleanroom & HVAC Build
steps.subtitle: Modular Cleanroom & HVAC Build
steps.std: Standard: ISO 14644-1, EU GMP Grade A-D
steps.desc: Installation of modular, non-shedding cleanroom wall panels and ceiling systems. Integrating custom AHUs with HEPA filtration to maintain precise temperature, humidity, and differential pressures.

steps.title: Process Integration & Piping
steps.subtitle: Process Integration & Piping
steps.desc: Integrating high-speed aseptic filling systems, isolator barriers, and preparation tanks. Specialized piping network build utilizing mirror-finish 316L stainless steel and clean sanitary valves.

steps.title: Automation, SCADA & CSV
steps.subtitle: Automation, SCADA & CSV
steps.desc: Software calibration and SCADA development. We engineer central control panels under strict computer software validation (CSV) rules, ensuring every recipe change is authorized, signed, and tracked.

steps.title: Qualification & Validation
steps.subtitle: Qualification & Validation
steps.std: Standard: PIC/S GMP, FDA Inspection Ready
steps.desc: Executing detailed IQ/OQ/PQ validation protocols. We run onsite stress tests, cleanroom particle counts, and process validation to build comprehensive documentation packages for regulatory bodies.

solutions.title: Core Integration Solutions
solutions.desc: Explore our turnkey solid, liquid, and semi-solid formulations systems integrated for sterile GMP environments.

items.title: Sterile Production
items.subtitle: Sterile Production
items.desc: Turnkey design of high-speed sterile filling lines, isolation barriers (Isolator), and sterilization tunnels utilizing VHP decontamination loop cycles to guarantee absolute sterility and particulate control.
items.specs: Aseptic filling lines and isolation barriers with VHP sterilization tunnels.

items.title: Solid Dosage
items.subtitle: Solid Dosage
items.desc: High-yield tablet press lines with closed weight feedback loop controls, capsule filling units, and continuous coating lines. Designed with dust extraction containment systems.
items.specs: High-yield tablet press lines with weight feedback loop controls and dust containment.

items.title: Semi-Solid Dosage
items.subtitle: Semi-Solid Dosage
items.desc: Vacuum homogenizing emulsifier vessels for fine ointment blending, preventing air pocket bubbles. Integrated with automated pharmaceutical tube filling and crimp sealing systems.
items.specs: Vacuum homogenizing emulsifiers and tube filling machines.

items.title: Liquid Dosage
items.subtitle: Liquid Dosage
items.desc: Syrup and suspension preparation vessels connected to automated bottle wash, filling, and cap torque controllers. Complete line design including volume verification cameras.
items.specs: Syrup & suspension preparation lines with bottle wash and inspection.

projects.title: Featured Case Studies
projects.desc: Read about our successfully validated line integrations and modular cleanroom builds.

why.title: Why ARGOTEX
why.desc: Total Solutions for Biopharma. We design, build, validate, and support production lines that consistently deliver on quality and results — owning the verification process rather than just selling machinery.

items.title: End-to-End System
items.desc: Comprehensive project ownership from initial CAD flow layouts to qualification binders (IQ/OQ/PQ).

items.title: Local Engineering 24/7
items.desc: Experienced in-country technical team available for scheduled service SLA and PLC emergency modifications.

items.title: Global FDA & GMP Standards
items.desc: Our software designs and panel overrides comply with FDA 21 CFR Part 11, GAMP 5, and EU Annex 1.

items.title: Uptime Support Lifecycle
items.desc: Custom calibration scheduling and preventive maintenance to optimize Overall Equipment Effectiveness (OEE).

downloads.title: Downloads & Technical Resources
downloads.desc: Access detailed catalogs, product brochures, modular cleanroom datasheets, and whitepapers.
downloads.doc_desc: Overview of modular panel options, HVAC parameters, line integrations, client references, and GMP checklists (PDF file).

contact.title: Book an Engineering Consultation
contact.desc: Provide your biopharmaceutical project parameters to receive a conceptual layout draft and turnkey proposal options.
contact.success: Engineering Consultation Scheduled — Thank you. Our lead system engineers will review your configuration parameters and follow up within 24 working hours.
